title: oenothera claviformis var. cruciformis
intro: Oenothera claviformis var. cruciformis, also known as the Cross-Beaked Evening Primrose, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Onagraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Oenothera claviformis var. cruciformis are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
